paragraphs.structure: Four sentences. Opens with a tableau of the fallen figure, pivots to the rescuer's prior act, returns to the grim image, then closes with tending and vigilance.
rhetorical-dna: Inverted syntax gives archaic, saga-like cadence
Passive, death-still figure contrasted with the active hands of the lesser companion
Visceral body-horror detail bracketed by gentleness
Final clause shifts from urgency to patient watchfulness, letting tension drain
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A lesser companion tends a fallen warrior after a beast-slaying on a precipice.

paragraphs.structure: Seven sentences building from prayer through divine commentary, into a long procedural descent sequence, finishing with a quiet time-stamp. Opens short, swells through extended compound sentences, then contracts to a flat declarative close.
rhetorical-dna: Narrator's ironic theological aside layered over genuine piety
Extended participial chains mimic the physical labor of rope-work and climbing
Repeated concessive constructions sustain a tone of hard-won perseverance
Archaic diction and syntax throughout, lending ceremonial weight to physical struggle
Final flat time-marker punctures the elevated register, grounding the scene
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A humble figure performs a perilous rescue descent, aided by desperate prayer and raw skill.

paragraphs.structure: Three sentences. A transitional time-skip opens into geographic traversal, each sentence longer than the last, accumulating place-names and compass directions in a steady march of terrain.
rhetorical-dna: Enumerative geography builds a mental map through accumulation rather than description
Steady, processional rhythm with no dramatic peaks; functions as a bridge
Archaic connective tissue maintains register without drawing attention
Final purpose clause quietly reintroduces intention after pure movement
paragraphs.respecification-seed: A party crosses harsh terrain over days, scouting a route toward their next ascent.
